custom_nodes.author: Dr.Lt.Data
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Manager
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI-Manager itself is also a custom node.

custom_nodes.author: Dr.Lt.Data
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Impact Pack
custom_nodes.description:
This node pack offers various detector nodes and detailer nodes that allow you to configure a workflow that automatically enhances facial details. And provide iterative upscaler.
NOTE: To use the UltralyticsDetectorProvider, you must install the 'ComfyUI Impact Subpack' separately.

custom_nodes.author: Dr.Lt.Data
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Impact Subpack
custom_nodes.description: This node pack provides nodes that complement the Impact Pack, such as the UltralyticsDetectorProvider.

custom_nodes.author: Dr.Lt.Data
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Inspire Pack
custom_nodes.description: This extension provides various nodes to support Lora Block Weight and the Impact Pack. Provides many easily applicable regional features and applications for Variation Seed.

custom_nodes.author: Dr.Lt.Data
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Connection Helper
custom_nodes.description: This is a helper extension for ComfyUI that assists with node connections.

custom_nodes.author: comfyanonymous
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_experiments
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: ModelSamplerTonemapNoiseTest, TonemapNoiseWithRescaleCFG, ReferenceOnlySimple, RescaleClassifierFreeGuidanceTest, ModelMergeBlockNumber, ModelMergeSDXL, ModelMergeSDXLTransformers, ModelMergeSDXLDetailedTransformers.

custom_nodes.author: comfyanonymous
custom_nodes.title: TensorRT Node for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: This node enables the best performance on NVIDIA RTX™ Graphics Cards  (GPUs) for Stable Diffusion by leveraging NVIDIA TensorRT.

custom_nodes.author: Stability-AI
custom_nodes.title: Stability API nodes for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description:
Nodes:Stability SD3, Stability Outpainting, Stability Search and Replace, Stability Image Core, Stability Inpainting, Stability Remove Background, Stability Creative Upscale.
Add API key to environment variable 'SAI_API_KEY'
Alternatively you can write your API key to file 'sai_platform_key.txt'
You can also use and/or override the above by entering your API key in the 'api_key_override' field of each node.

custom_nodes.author: Stability-AI
custom_nodes.title: stability-ComfyUI-nodes
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: ColorBlend, ControlLoraSave, GetImageSize. NOTE: Control-LoRA recolor example uses these nodes.

custom_nodes.author: Fannovel16
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI's ControlNet Auxiliary Preprocessors
custom_nodes.description: Plug-and-play ComfyUI node sets for making ControlNet hint images.

custom_nodes.author: Fannovel16
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Frame Interpolation
custom_nodes.description: A custom node suite for Video Frame Interpolation in ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: Fannovel16
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI MotionDiff
custom_nodes.description: Implementation of MDM, MotionDiffuse and ReMoDiffuse into ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: Fannovel16
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Video-Matting
custom_nodes.description: A minimalistic implementation of [a/Robust Video Matting (RVM)](https://github.com/PeterL1n/RobustVideoMatting/) in ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: Fannovel16
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MagickWand
custom_nodes.description:
Proper implementation of ImageMagick - the famous software suite for editing and manipulating digital images to ComfyUI using [a/wandpy](https://github.com/emcconville/wand).
NOTE: You need to install ImageMagick, manually.

custom_nodes.author: time-river
custom_nodes.title: CLIPSeg
custom_nodes.description:
The CLIPSeg node generates a binary mask for a given input image and text prompt.
NOTE:This custom node is a forked custom node with hotfixes applied from the [a/original repository](https://github.com/biegert/ComfyUI-CLIPSeg), which is no longer maintained.

custom_nodes.author: BlenderNeko
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Cutoff
custom_nodes.description: These custom nodes provides features that allow for better control over the effects of the text prompt.

custom_nodes.author: BlenderNeko
custom_nodes.title: Advanced CLIP Text Encode
custom_nodes.description: Advanced CLIP Text Encode (if you need A1111 like prompt. you need this. But Cutoff node includes this feature, already.)

custom_nodes.author: BlenderNeko
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Noise
custom_nodes.description: This extension contains 6 nodes for ComfyUI that allows for more control and flexibility over the noise.

custom_nodes.author: BlenderNeko
custom_nodes.title: Tiled sampling for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: This extension contains a tiled sampler for ComfyUI. It allows for denoising larger images by splitting it up into smaller tiles and denoising these. It tries to minimize any seams for showing up in the end result by gradually denoising all tiles one step at the time and randomizing tile positions for every step.

custom_nodes.author: BlenderNeko
custom_nodes.title: SeeCoder [WIP]
custom_nodes.description: It provides the capability to generate CLIP from an image input, unlike unCLIP, which works in all models. (To use this extension, you need to download the required model file from **Install Models**)

custom_nodes.author: jags111
custom_nodes.title: Efficiency Nodes for ComfyUI Version 2.0+
custom_nodes.description: A collection of ComfyUI custom nodes to help streamline workflows and reduce total node count.[w/NOTE: This node is originally created by LucianoCirino, but the [a/original repository](https://github.com/LucianoCirino/efficiency-nodes-comfyui) is no longer maintained and has been forked by a new maintainer. To use the forked version, you should uninstall the original version and **REINSTALL** this one.]

custom_nodes.author: jags111
custom_nodes.title: Jags_VectorMagic
custom_nodes.description: a collection of nodes to explore Vector and image manipulation

custom_nodes.author: jags111
custom_nodes.title: Jags_Audiotools
custom_nodes.description: This extension offers various audio generation tools

custom_nodes.author: Derfuu
custom_nodes.title: Derfuu_ComfyUI_ModdedNodes
custom_nodes.description: Automate calculation depending on image sizes or something you want.

custom_nodes.author: paulo-coronado
custom_nodes.title: comfy_clip_blip_node
custom_nodes.description: CLIPTextEncodeBLIP: This custom node provides a CLIP Encoder that is capable of receiving images as input.

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: WAS Node Suite
custom_nodes.description: A node suite for ComfyUI with many new nodes, such as image processing, text processing, and more.

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Preset Merger
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: ModelMergeByPreset. Merge checkpoint models by preset

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: PPF_Noise_ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: WAS_PFN_Latent. Perlin Power Fractal Noisey Latents

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: Power Noise Suite for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: Power Noise Suite contains nodes centered around latent noise input, and diffusion, as well as latent adjustments.

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: FreeU_Advanced
custom_nodes.description: This custom node provides advanced settings for FreeU.

custom_nodes.author: WASasquatch
custom_nodes.title: WAS_Extras
custom_nodes.description: Nodes:Conditioning (Blend), Inpainting VAE Encode (WAS), VividSharpen. Experimental nodes, or other random extra helper nodes.

custom_nodes.author: omar92
custom_nodes.title: Quality of life Suit:V2
custom_nodes.description:
openAI suite, String suite, Latent Tools, Image Tools: These custom nodes provide expanded functionality for image and string processing, latent processing, as well as the ability to interface with models such as ChatGPT/DallE-2.
NOTE: Currently, this extension does not support the new OpenAI API, leading to compatibility issues.

custom_nodes.author: lilly1987
custom_nodes.title: simple wildcard for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: These custom nodes provides a feature to insert arbitrary inputs through wildcards in the prompt. Additionally, this tool provides features that help simplify workflows, such as VAELoaderDecoder and SimplerSample.

custom_nodes.author: sylym
custom_nodes.title: Vid2vid
custom_nodes.description: A node suite for ComfyUI that allows you to load image sequence and generate new image sequence with different styles or content.

custom_nodes.author: EllangoK
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-post-processing-nodes
custom_nodes.description: A collection of post processing nodes for ComfyUI, which enable a variety of visually striking image effects.

custom_nodes.author: LEv145
custom_nodes.title: ImagesGrid
custom_nodes.description: This tool provides a viewer node that allows for checking multiple outputs in a grid, similar to the X/Y Plot extension.

custom_nodes.author: diontimmer
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Vextra-Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: Pixel Sort, Swap Color Mode, Solid Color, Glitch This, Add Text To Image, Play Sound, Prettify Prompt, Generate Noise, Flatten Colors

custom_nodes.author: CYBERLOOM-INC
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-nodes-hnmr
custom_nodes.description: Provide various custom nodes for Latent, Sampling, Model, Loader, Image, Text. This is the fixed version of the original [a/ComfyUI-nodes-hnmr](https://github.com/hnmr293/ComfyUI-nodes-hnmr) by hnmr293.

custom_nodes.author: BadCafeCode
custom_nodes.title: Masquerade Nodes
custom_nodes.description: This is a low-dependency node pack primarily dealing with masks. The author recommends using Impact-Pack instead (unless you specifically have trouble installing dependencies).

custom_nodes.author: Jcd1230
custom_nodes.title: Rembg Background Removal Node for ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: Image Remove Background (rembg)

custom_nodes.author: YinBailiang
custom_nodes.title: MergeBlockWeighted_fo_ComfyUI
custom_nodes.description: Nodes: MergeBlockWeighted
